name: Xeris Biopharma Holdings, Inc.
summary: Xeris Biopharma Holdings, Inc. along with its subsidiaries, is referenced herein as the "Company", "Xeris", "Xeris Biopharma", "we" or "our". Throughout this document, unless otherwise noted, references to Gvoke include Gvoke PFS, Gvoke HypoPen, and Gvoke Kit. Overview We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for people with chronic endocrine and neurological diseases in the United States.
